items.title: Epic Games asks U.S. Supreme Court to deny Apple's petition in App Store case
items.summary: Epic Games is asking the U.S. Supreme Court to reject Apple's latest attempt to challenge two rulings in its long-running legal fight over off-App-Store purchases. Here are the details.

items.summary: The two points Apple has brought to the Supreme Court could undo the entire remainder of the case, so of course Epic Games has filed to suggest Apple is totally wrong here. Epic Games hopes the Supreme Court will throw out Apple's...

items.title: First AI agent for Messages Business Chat approved by Apple
items.summary: The Poke app will give Siri even more competition, as it lets you send emails, set reminders, generate images, and more, right from the Apple Messages app. The Poke app lets you use AI to respond to messages, schedule dinners, and more,...

items.title: Ahead of its IPO, Anthropic's Daniela Amodei shrugs off doubts about AI's returns
items.summary: Anthropic has been growing at a breakneck pace. The company announced that annualized revenue crossed $47 billion in May, up dramatically from roughly $9 billion at the end of 2025. That trajectory faces a real test, though.

items.title: Get 88 hours of AI cybersecurity training for less than $20
items.summary: The 2026 AI Security & Cybersecurity Expert Bundle delivers 88 hours of training on AI, ethical hacking and real-world defense skills. (via Cult of Mac - Your source for the latest Apple news, rumors, analysis, reviews, how-tos and deals. )

items.title: Airbnb's Brian Chesky plans to launch a new AI lab
items.summary: The Airbnb CEO said last year it hasn't struck an LLM partnership because existing products weren't quite ready.

items.title: Engineering Documentation is a Critical Source of Truth - Do You Know if it's Accurate?

items.title: 8GB of RAM is back on laptops - companies are lowering memory offerings to make affordable notebooks during component crisis
items.summary: At Computex, Dell and Acer both introduced systems starting with 8GB of RAM to compete with the MacBook Neo, following a rush to 16GB systems in the last two years to bolster local AI.
